## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's sales pipeline and discuss strategy sprint timelines, client updates, and operational improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strategy sprint timeline is set with two kickoffs secured for the 15th; maintaining two sprints per week moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Strong pipeline position with multiple potential clients in various stages of contracting](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Plans to improve HubSpot usage for better visibility and streamlined processes, including auto-renewals and contact/deal creation](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Discussions on handling legacy upsells and potential partnerships, with a focus on maintaining high-value clients](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

## Topics

### Strategy Sprint Timeline

  - [Two kickoffs secured for September 15th](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Maintaining two sprints per week for future weeks](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [CodeRabbit signed for September 22nd; Redis in yellow status (stalled)](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Multiple options for September 22nd and 29th slots (e.g., Enable, Spectro Ops, LightSource, Norm, Bubble)](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Client Updates

  - [Redis: Slow movement with legal; considering investor intervention to speed up procurement](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [LightSource: Awaiting update after recent communication](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Engine: Price negotiations ongoing; awaiting internal decision on reduced price offer](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Ramp: Delicate situation due to underpayment; suggestion to not pursue hard until after fundraise](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Galileo: Focus on renewing contract rather than upselling to strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [DataGrid: Potential re-scoping of contract while maintaining current revenue ($39,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Udemy: Need to revisit procurement for Phase 2 signing (scheduled for October 5th)](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [Plans to utilize HubSpot more effectively as a source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Implementing auto-renewals in HubSpot for growth execution deals](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Exploring installation of HubSpot extension in Marcel's Gmail for automated contact and deal creation](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Discussing potential partnership structures and referral bonuses for high-value introductions](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to clean up HubSpot data by next week for improved pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/oJXBnWSyEzAPL-k1zxPi7NmHg-c2BB_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
